chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: at least one Order Line Item

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: A single line within a Sales Order

triplets.subject: ORDER_LINE_ITEM
triplets.object: Individual product lines within a sales order.

triplets.subject: SHIPMENT
triplets.object: Physical delivery of products to customers.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item in a Sales Order representing a single product, its quantity, and unit price at the time of purchase.
synonyms: A single line within a Sales Order
Individual product lines within a sales order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT is the product master table containing product identifiers and attributes, with PRODUCT_ID as the primary key and a foreign key to TB_CATEGORY for category linkage.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | **Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) | | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | | | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | Category         → TB_CATEGORY | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO | | | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | | CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | | UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO | | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A field on an Order Line Item that stores the identifier of the Product associated with that line item (linking the line item to a specific product).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Product | **Key Attributes**:
- Quantity of units ordered | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Key Attributes**:
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Order Line Item Relationships**:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sale

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order is a customer's request to purchase goods or services in a business transaction, including related processes such as refunds when the order is cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a financial transaction recording the settlement of a Sales Order, identified by a unique ID, with attributes such as method, amount, timestamp, and status, associating to exactly one Sales Order (though an order may have multiple payments).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product is a tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform, identified by a unique SKU.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
PRODUCT
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name | **Key Attributes**:
- Unit price in base currency (EUR) | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Key Attributes**:
- Belongs to exactly one Category | **Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold | **Business Rules**:
- Prices can change daily based on market conditions | **Business Rules**:
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference | **Synonyms**: item, article, goods, merchandise, SKU | **Related Concepts**: Category, Inventory, OrderLineItem | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Order Line Item Relationships**:

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Display Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: The publicly visible, human-readable name assigned to a product that is displayed to customers in catalogs, listings, and user interfaces.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | **Key Attributes**:
- Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: SALES_ORDER_HDR is the header record for a sales order, identified by ORDER_ID, linked to the customer via CUST_ID, and referenced by related order line items, payments, and shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: Shipment is the fulfillment event/record in the order-to-delivery process that delivers products to a customer, typically linked to a single Sales Order and originating from a specific warehouse.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: A master record for all registered platform customers, represented by the CUSTOMER_MASTER table with CUST_ID as the primary key.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | **Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers. | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

entities_post_resolution.name: Whether Customer Can
entities_post_resolution.definition: The customer's full name field representing the complete name of a customer as stored in the customer record for identification in orders and communications.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
| IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | | CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:

- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Sales Order Relationships:

entities_post_resolution.name: Geographic Region For
entities_post_resolution.definition: A geographic region identifier used to determine tax obligations or calculate taxes within a tax regulatory domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | | REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Refund: a reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: 30 Days Of Purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Not Yet Shipped
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped

entities_post_resolution.name: Price At Time
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifiers, contact details, regional affiliation, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, naming, category association, pricing, and whether the product is currently active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category data for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores the header information for sales orders, including identifiers, customer linkage, order date, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores line-item details for each order, including which product was ordered, the quantity, unit price, and the calculated line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments, linking each shipment to its related order, tracking details, and current shipment status.
